mapper.select:
select id,status,volume,user_name,email,all_volume from user where 1=1
and user_name like concat('%',#{userName},'%')

select u.id ,u.status,u.volume,u.user_name,u.email,u.all_volume from user u inner join banned_user bu where bu.user_id=u.id and 1=1
and user_name like concat('%',#{userName},'%')
